title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes four strategies Anthropic's Growth Team used with Claude Code to accelerate revenue growth from $1B to $19B in 14 months: automating existing workflows, making previously sub-threshold work viable, building custom tools, and using AI as a thought partner. He identifies a common ceiling where AI usage becomes counterproductive rather than leveraging.
